allow: PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Output "PID=$\($proc.Id\) Name=$\($proc.ProcessName\) Path=$\($proc.Path\)" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 3000" })

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq 'Listen'\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($id in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "killed PID $id" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State)

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq 'Listen'\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($id in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "killed PID $id" })

Bash(python -c "import sys, json, re; raw=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'data: \(\\{.*\\}\)\\s*$', raw\); data=json.loads\(m.group\(1\)\) if m else {}; print\('projectSummary:', data.get\('projectSummary','MISSING'\)\); print\('finalSummary \(first 200\):', \(data.get\('finalSummary'\) or ''\)[:200]\); print\('---'\); [print\(f\\"[{r['category']}] {r['primary']['toolId']}: {r['primary']['reasoning'][:140]}\\"\) for r in data.get\('recommendations',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('projectSummary:', d['projectSummary']\); print\(\); print\('finalSummary \(first 350\):'\); print\(d['finalSummary'][:350]\); print\(\); print\('Cards:'\); [print\(f\\"  [{r['category']}] {r['primary']['toolId']}\\\\n    reasoning: {r['primary']['reasoning'][:140]}\\\\n    pros: {r['primary']['pros']}\\\\n    cons: {r['primary']['cons']}\\"\) for r in d['recommendations']]")
